# StayFinder

> A resort and stay booking platform. Browse stays, view amenities, reviews, pricing, and book directly.

## Main Pages

- [Home](/): Browse all available stays and resorts by category
- [Stay Details](/stay/): Individual stay pages with description, amenities, room categories, reviews, pricing, nearby destinations

## Key Information

- This is a resort/hotel booking platform
- Each stay page contains: name, location, description, amenities, room categories, pricing, reviews, nearby destinations, booking options
- Stays are organized by category (e.g. Couple Friendly, Family Stay, Luxury Resort)
- Bookings can be made directly on each stay page

## Optional

- [Wishlist](/wishlist): Save favorite stays
